title: Innovative Juicy Spanish Nectarines Paella Valenciana
description: A nutty and juicy twist on the traditional Spanish dish, featuring nectarines and air-fried to perfection, this diabetic-friendly paella is a festive and flavorful meal option.

ingredients.name: chicken breast
ingredients.notes: boneless and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the Spanish rice and stir to combine, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
Add the diced nectarines and stir to combine, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the paella pan to the air fryer and cook at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
Remove the paella from the air fryer and stir in the lemon juice.
Return the paella to the air fryer and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the paella from the air fryer and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
